overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a dark forest at night. The scene begins dry but transitions to a heavy downpour midway through, with the character continuing to traverse the wooded trail.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a dark forest path, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming the forest boundary on the left side
tall evergreen trees forming the forest boundary on the right side
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest undergrowth
light-colored boulder or rock outcropping visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with a character walking away from the camera along a narrow dirt path. Tall pine trees line both sides of the trail, barely visible in the low light conditions. The environment is still and quiet with no precipitation.

events.description: heavy rain begins falling suddenly, creating dense vertical streaks of precipitation throughout the scene

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the forest trail as heavy rain begins to fall around them

segments.scene_description: The weather shifts dramatically as heavy rain begins to fall on the forest trail. The character continues walking forward through the downpour, with rain streaks visible against the dark backdrop of trees. The dirt path becomes visibly wet as the precipitation intensifies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, nocturnal forest as a character traverses a lonely trail. It begins with the camera trailing behind a figure walking away along a narrow dirt path, flanked by towering pine trees that loom in the low light. The environment remains still and quiet, with the dense foliage barely visible against the midnight sky. The scene maintains this oppressive silence and dry atmosphere as the character continues deeper into the wooded wilderness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest as a dry evening transforms into a heavy downpour. It begins with the weather shifting dramatically, as the first streaks of rain begin to fall against the dark backdrop of the trees. As the character continues walking forward, the precipitation intensifies into a dense deluge that fills the air. The scene then shifts to show the environmental impact of the storm, with the dirt path becoming visibly wet and slick under the intensifying rain.
